languages.text: "Странный шум — который, впрочем, не имеет психического следа. Полагаю, продолжительное воздействие может приводить к эмоциональным всплескам — лучше следить за собой и не поддаваться порывам".

traits.locale_text: ДРАФТ "Я не ощущаю психического воздействия, Ваша Светлость. Но да, вы правы. Шум заглушает мысли и вызывает желание поддаться эмоциями. Хорошо, что даже аколиты обучены противостоять примитивным позывам".
"Странный шум — который, впрочем, не имеет психического следа. Полагаю, продолжительное воздействие может приводить к эмоциональным всплескам — лучше следить за собой и не поддаваться порывам".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."
languages.original_text: "Странный шум — который, впрочем, не имеет психического следа. Полагаю, продолжительное воздействие может приводить к эмоциональным всплескам — лучше следить за собой и не поддаваться порывам".

traits.locale_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to remain mindful of one's own state and not give in to rash impulses."

"A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to remain mindful of one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

DRAFT "I sense no psychic influence, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But yes, you are correct. The noise drowns out thoughts and evokes the desire to succumb to one's emotions. It is fortunate that even acolytes are trained to resist primitive urges."

"A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to remain mindful of one's own state and not give in to rash impulses."

"A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to remain mindful of one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

"A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

languages.text: «Es un ruido peculiar que no deja rastro psíquico. Imagino que una exposición prolongada podría causar volatilidad emocional. Sería buena idea vigilar el estado mental de cada uno y no sucumbir a los impulsos».
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: «Es un ruido peculiar que no deja rastro psíquico. Imagino que una exposición prolongada podría causar volatilidad emocional. Sería buena idea vigilar el estado mental de cada uno y no sucumbir a los impulsos».

«Es un ruido peculiar que no deja rastro psíquico. Imagino que una exposición prolongada podría causar volatilidad emocional. Sería buena idea vigilar el estado mental de cada uno y no sucumbir a los impulsos».

languages.text: “一阵古怪的噪音，然而没有留下任何灵能痕迹。我推测，长时间暴露其中可能导致情绪失控。明智的做法是留意自身的精神状态，切勿屈从于鲁莽的冲动。”
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: “一阵古怪的噪音，然而没有留下任何灵能痕迹。我推测，长时间暴露其中可能导致情绪失控。明智的做法是留意自身的精神状态，切勿屈从于鲁莽的冲动。”

languages.text: « C'est un bruit étrange, et qui ne laisse pourtant aucune trace psychique. Je soupçonne qu'une exposition prolongée risquerait de mener à une instabilité émotionnelle. Il serait sage que chacun surveille son état mental et se garde d'agir sur une impulsion. »
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un bruit étrange, et qui ne laisse pourtant aucune trace psychique. Je soupçonne qu'une exposition prolongée risquerait de mener à une instabilité émotionnelle. Il serait sage que chacun surveille son état mental et se garde d'agir sur une impulsion. »

« Un bruit étrange, et qui ne laisse pourtant aucune trace psychique. Je soupçonne qu'une exposition prolongée risquerait de mener à l'instabilité émotionnelle. Il serait sage que chacun surveille son état mental et se garde d'agir sur une impulsion. »

languages.text: "Tuhaf bir gürültü ama ruhsezi izi bırakmıyor. Uzun süre maruz kalmanın duygusal dengesizliğe yol açabileceğinden şüpheleniyorum. İnsanın kendi ruh hâlini gözlemlemesi ve fevri dürtülere boyun eğmemesi akıllıca olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: "Tuhaf bir gürültü ama ruhsezi izi bırakmıyor. Uzun süre maruz kalmanın duygusal dengesizliğe yol açabileceğinden şüpheleniyorum. İnsanın kendi ruh hâlini gözlemlemesi ve fevri dürtülere boyun eğmemesi akıllıca olacaktır."

"Tuhaf bir gürültü ama ruhsezi izi bırakmıyor. Uzun süre maruz kalmanın duygusal dengesizliğe yol açabileceğinden şüpheleniyorum. İnsanın kendi ruh hâlinin farkında olması ve fevri dürtülere boyun eğmemesi akıllıca olacaktır."

languages.text: "Ein eigenartiges Geräusch, das aber keine psychische Spur hinterlässt. Ich vermute, eine längere Exposition könnte emotionale Schwankungen auslösen. Es wäre klug, den eigenen Geisteszustand zu überwachen und keinen unbedachten Impulsen nachzugeben."
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: "Ein eigenartiges Geräusch, das aber keine psychische Spur hinterlässt. Ich vermute, eine längere Exposition könnte emotionale Schwankungen auslösen. Es wäre klug, den eigenen Geisteszustand zu überwachen und keinen unbedachten Impulsen nachzugeben."

"Ein eigenartiges Geräusch, das aber keine psychische Spur hinterlässt. Ich vermute, eine längere Exposition könnte emotionale Schwankungen auslösen. Es wäre klug, auf den eigenen Geisteszustand zu achten und keinen unbedachten Impulsen nachzugeben."

languages.text: 「特異なノイズだが、精神的な痕跡は残さない。長時間さらされると、感情の起伏が激しくなるのではないか。自分自身の精神状態に気を配り、軽率な衝動に身を任せないことが賢明だろう。"
languages.original_text: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to remain mindful of one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."

traits.locale_text: 「特異なノイズだが、精神的な痕跡は残さない。長時間さらされると、感情の起伏が激しくなるのではないか。自分自身の精神状態に気を配り、軽率な衝動に身を任せないことが賢明だろう。"
